sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Topa tung lungdam ngah nuamte’n, kisak theihna pai in;
Um in Ama thu a phate, hong piak
ding ngaihsun in.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Mawh phelna, nuam vanglianpi,
Lungdamsak ning, Amin
phatna;
Sianthona pha, vantung om hi,
Kei tang si hi, Jesuh Khazih Topa.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: A thu
le hong itna pha a, Asi tawh hong sawp hi;
I mawhna khempeuh hong sawp a, Nopna pha kingah
hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Mawhna vanglian sukgawp nading, siamna pha hong pia hi;
Lungsim sunga siantho
nading, kha pha hong bawlsak hi.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Adang lungsim zawh nadingin, Kha Siangtho hong pia
hi;
Apha bel Khazih Topa in, i lung sungah om hi.

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Naupang bangmah’n i up
ciangin, thupha i ngah ding hi;
Thupha bel Khazih Topa in, hong piak ding ciamsa hi.
